# Tonk Card Game

> Browser-based Tonk (Tunk) card game with AI opponents, built with vanilla JavaScript and Vite.

## Project Overview

**Tech Stack:** HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JavaScript (ES6 modules), Vite
**Status:** Active Development
**Purpose:** Single-player card game for browser play against 1-3 AI opponents

## Core Documentation

- `README.md` — Setup and getting started
- `CLAUDE.md` — AI assistant instructions, build commands, architecture
- `CODE_MAP.md` — Feature-to-file map
- `docs/ai/memory.md` — Project history and current state
- `docs/ai/roadmap.md` — Forward-looking priorities
- `docs/ai/tasks.md` — Active work
- `docs/ai/decisions.md` — Architecture decisions
- `docs/ai/architecture.md` — System design
- `ENTRY_POINTS.md` — Where execution starts
- `DATA_FLOW.md` — System-level data movement
- `FEATURE_BOUNDARIES.md` — Component responsibilities

## Key Files by Area

### Game Logic
- `src/game/Game.js` — Main game controller, state machine, event emitter
- `src/game/rules.js` — Constants, phases, win conditions
- `src/game/ComputerPlayer.js` — AI decision-making
- `src/game/Spread.js` — Spread validation (books/runs)
- `src/game/Player.js` — Hand and chip management
- `src/game/Deck.js` — Deck and discard pile
- `src/game/Card.js` — Card representation

### UI
- `src/ui/GameUI.js` — DOM rendering, input handling, modals
- `src/ui/CardRenderer.js` — Card element factory
- `src/ui/CardLayoutManager.js` — Responsive card sizing
- `src/ui/animations.js` — CSS animation utilities

### Utilities
- `src/utils/storage.js` — localStorage persistence
- `src/utils/helpers.js` — General utilities

## Common Tasks

**To run dev server:** `npm run dev` (serves at localhost:5173)
**To build:** `npm run build` (outputs to dist/)
**To debug:** Access `window.game` and `window.ui` in browser console during dev

## Environment Variables

- None required
